items.title: North Korean hackers used AI-enabled social engineering in Zerion attack
items.whyYouShouldCare: The use of AI in cyberattacks highlights vulnerabilities in the crypto ecosystem, potentially impacting user confidence and security measures across platforms including Solana.

items.title: SOL, ADA, DOGE pull back, bitcoin holds above $74,000 as Asia recoups Iran war losses
items.whyYouShouldCare: The price movements of SOL, ADA, and DOGE against Bitcoin's stability indicate shifting investor sentiment, which could affect liquidity and trading strategies in the Solana ecosystem.

items.title: Figure and Hastra widen DeFi credit offering with auto loan launch
items.whyYouShouldCare: The expansion of DeFi credit offerings through auto loans enhances the utility of blockchain platforms, potentially increasing user engagement and transaction volume within the Solana ecosystem.
